title: Garbled characters appear when setting Chinese title

comments.body: I had the same issue with Unicode characters in window titles on Windows. Found this resource that explained the root cause and workarounds: https://cprogramming.tips/unicode-windows-console-fix/ - it's specifically about SDL2 window title encoding on Windows and really helped me understand the problem.

body:
- [ ] I have read the [FAQ](https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/blob/master/FAQ.md).
 - [ ] I have searched in existing [issues](https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues).

**Environment**
 - OS: Windows
 - scrcpy version: 1.21
 - installation method: Windows release
 - device model: Pixel 2 XL
 - Android version: 11

**Describe the bug**
Garbled characters appear when setting Chinese title

![微信截图_20220110093928](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/5268512/148710219-b49773cb-c873-4b75-a0a0-7c6480f2f69d.png)
![微信截图_20220110094428](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/5268512/148710234-a9d65c2f-344a-4f6c-92e8-01426e5dc913.png)

PS D:\soft\scrcpy-win64-v1.21>  .\scrcpy.exe -s 806KPSL1950254 --window-title 中文标题hello
scrcpy 1.21 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy>
